payload.purpose_context: The doctrine-controlled transition gates (half A, #2871) shipped with three deliberately-deferred follow-ups (#2873): a fully-duplicated dead census-derivation tier, a port contract that welds two orthogonal concerns onto one type check, and — most importantly — an unrealized 'one command authority for baseline and head' promise that mis-reports every review as failing the moment a consumer uses a non-pytest test command or half B adds a second command source. This mission retires the dead code, decouples the port, and closes the baseline-head correctness split so the gate is correct and clean before half B (#2599).
payload.purpose_tldr: Retire dead code and close a latent baseline-comparison bug in the doctrine-controlled review gate, before its executable-assets successor (half B) builds on it.

pre_review_gate.reason: baseline uncomputable — surfacing all current failures as unverified

reason: Re-pinned canonical parity harness (_capture.py + test_transition_gate_parity.py) from e4ef6e850 to lane HEAD 7081cf0537c6d2b7cddde3b1bd3c09be2dc61e41 (byte-identical to mission base eb06ca176 under src/specify_cli/review/ and tests/review/ -- confirmed via empty git diff --stat). Added override_nonempty scenario generator (NFR-006): drives _mt_pre_review_gate_with_override_scope -> evaluate_with_scope(scope_source=None) -> run_scoped_tests_at_head with a non-empty ("tests/foo",) target list, verified non-vacuous via captured run_state=='completed' and non-empty test_targets in the fixture + a dedicated replay assertion. Captured NFR-001 registry-path golden (12 fixtures, unchanged content, provenance-only diff) + NFR-006 override golden (4 new fixtures, full block/force 2x2 matrix). test_transition_gate_parity.py replays all 16 goldens green (56 tests incl. the previously-xfail through-hook arm, now green from an earlier mission). Added tests/review/test_pre_review_gate_sole_caller_audit.py (T005, green-on-base characterization, not red-first): confirms via AST call-site scan that evaluate_pre_review_gate has exactly 2 production callers (gate_registry.py's _spec_kitty_pre_review_handler, which always passes a non-None scope_source -- confirmed both structurally and via a monkeypatch spy -- and tasks_move_task.py's _mt_pre_review_gate_verdict, whose call site omits scope_source entirely, reaching the census branch), and that _mt_pre_review_gate_verdict itself has zero production call sites (dead code, only a compat re-export + a name-listing test reference it). ruff + mypy --strict clean on all changed/created files, zero suppressions.

Added tests/review/test_pre_review_gate_sole_caller_audit.py (T005, green-on-base characterization, not red-first): confirms via AST call-site scan that evaluate_pre_review_gate has exactly 2 production callers (gate_registry.py's _spec_kitty_pre_review_handler, which always passes a non-None scope_source -- confirmed both structurally and via a monkeypatch spy -- and tasks_move_task.py's _mt_pre_review_gate_verdict, whose call site omits scope_source entirely, reaching the census branch), and that _mt_pre_review_gate_verdict itself has zero production call sites (dead code, only a compat re-export + a name-listing test reference it). ruff + mypy --strict clean on all changed/created files, zero suppressions.

reason: Factory+selection (T006/T010, both branches tested, spec-kitty->GateCoverageScopeSource confirmed); source-owned parse_mode + scope_source_identity single-authority (T007, dispatch-through-parse_mode proven via monkeypatch spy/branch-flip); two independent predicates proven via synthetic one-not-other source (T008); ScopeBreakdownMixin refactor with WP01 golden replayed byte-identical (T009); NFR-005 dual-root test_command/identity equality + structural same-helper pin (T012); intent-migration off isinstance onto predicates (T011). Allowlisted the 7 new additive symbols in test_no_dead_symbols.py (consumed by WP03/WP04, #2873) since this WP does not wire tasks_move_task/baseline/pre_review_gate callers by design. mypy --strict + ruff clean; 145 tests green (test_scope_source.py + test_transition_gate_parity.py + test_no_dead_symbols.py + test_golden_count_ban.py).

review.reference: APPROVED. Anti-dup (paula GAP) verified: scope_source_identity delegates ONLY to source-owned parse_mode, never re-inspects raw — proven by contradictory-parse_mode test (forces text on no-artifact GateCoverage, token follows parse_mode). DeclaredCommand.parse_results genuinely dispatches through parse_mode (behavioral spy flips branch on forced 'none'); GateCoverage.parse_mode is 'junit_xml' even no-artifact. NFR-001 golden replays 50 passed byte-identical; file_to_scope IS ScopeBreakdownMixin.file_to_scope, DeclaredCommand inherits neither mixin nor ClassVar. Predicates read DISTINCT signals (isinstance vs ClassVar getattr), synthetic one-not-other passes. FR-014 selection reads baseline._get_test_command surface, spec-kitty (no review.test_command) explicitly routes to GateCoverageScopeSource; stale :51-55 comment + review-gates.md:174 fixed. mypy --strict + ruff clean, zero suppressions. Only owned files + arch-gate touched; no pre_review_gate/baseline/workflow_executor/tasks_move_task edits. Ratchet red is _SKIP_MARKED_BLOCKS (#2825), pre-existing — lane-b never touches that file. TECH-DEBT FLAG: WP02 appends _CATEGORY_C_WP_IN_FLIGHT_SCOPE_SOURCE_HUB (7 symbols) to tests/architectural/test_no_dead_symbols.py to allowlist the additive surface with no callers yet. This is justified (WP02 introduces the symbols, so its own dead-symbol gate would flag them) but WP04 MUST DELETE this _CATEGORY_C_WP_IN_FLIGHT_SCOPE_SOURCE_HUB category (and its union line) once WP03/WP04 wire live src/ callers, else it becomes permanent masking. The category comment itself records this obligation (#2873).

reason: Deleted 12 dead census symbols + census branch from pre_review_gate.py (WP01 goldens byte-identical); atomic compat delete of _mt_pre_review_gate_verdict (157->156); SOURCE_MISMATCH added + fail-open asserted; head path rewired onto resolve_scope_source (FR-014, priti-M1); 4-combo baseline<->head parity + SC-004 mismatch demo green, one combo driven through the real _mt_resolve_scope_source wrapper; migrated all test-suite fallout from the deletion (test_pre_review_gate_engine.py, test_scope_source.py, test_pre_review_scope_singlesource.py, deleted test_census_parity.py, re-adjudicated test_pre_review_gate_sole_caller_audit.py); retired the scope_source dead-symbol allowlist hub, replaced with a narrowly-justified entry for the 4 concrete ScopeSource classes that are structurally never cross-module-imported by the Protocol-port design; fixed a latent relative-junitxml head-side bug the parity suite surfaced. ruff/mypy --strict clean on owned src files. Pre-existing reds confirmed unrelated: test_baseline_anti_narrowing.py golden-count (WP03), test_ratchet_baselines.py _SKIP_MARKED_BLOCKS 12->13, tasks_move_task.py:1803 mypy no-any-return.

review.reference: APPROVED. Deletion (12 census symbols + scope_source-is-None branch + filter_groups/composite_routing params + scope_source=None default) correct; keep-live C-002 set survives; private scope_source.py census copy untouched; both parity golden arms replay byte-identical green (381 passed). Atomic compat: SYMBOL_TO_MODULE 157->156 with golden-count marker kept, tuple entry + tasks.py re-export removed, docstring 76->75, all in one commit d19bd566c. SOURCE_MISMATCH built in _evaluate_via_scope_source (compares already-loaded baseline only; no new baseline read); fail-open ASSERTED not edited (WARN_PROCEED via real aggregate_verdicts even block_enabled); console ladder has SOURCE_MISMATCH + explicit NO_NEW_FAILURES + defensive else. Head-path rewire delegates to resolve_scope_source; parity combo-2 drives the REAL _mt_resolve_scope_source wrapper; _run_raw_command relative-junitxml B1 fix mirrors baseline.py:479-480 and is correct (cwd=repo_root). 4-combo parity + SC-004 all green. Gate reds all confirmed PRE-EXISTING (not WP04): mypy no-any-return at _mt_shell_pid_baseline (untouched by WP04), golden-count-ban tests/review ceiling reproduced at pre-WP04 tree 24fc2fc3b (from WP03, count stayed 1), ratchet (WP04 adds no skip marks). ruff+mypy otherwise clean, complexity ok, zero suppressions. NEW ALLOWLIST ENTRY _CATEGORY_C_SCOPE_SOURCE_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTED is JUSTIFIED not masking: all 4 classes (GateCoverageScopeSource, DeclaredCommandScopeSource, FileScopeBreakdown, ScopeBreakdownMixin) are genuinely live (constructed via resolve_scope_source at scope_source.py:686-687, mixin inherited, FileScopeBreakdown returned) but never named cross-module by Protocol-port design; the 4 now-wired symbols were correctly removed from the old allowlist. TEST-MIGRATION WP04 ABSORBED (WP05/FR-004 reconciliation): (a) FR-004a census_parity.py DELETED (correct-one compared copy gone); the 6 _derive tests in test_pre_review_gate_engine.py were MIGRATED FORWARD onto _scope_result_from_source (not deleted-they now cover a live path); (b) FR-004b both derive_test_scope-oracle tests repointed to literal goldens; (c) FR-004c the 8 verdict-diff tests MIGRATED to evaluate_with_scope(ScopeResult,scope_source=None) kept-live tail (NOT the plan's scope_source= injection, but coverage-equivalent and actually protects the NFR-006 keep-live tail; intent preserved: NO_COVERAGE/terminal/None+sentinel-baseline/NEW_FAILURES); (d) M-mut mutation-bite MIGRATED FORWARD IN-PLACE in test_pre_review_scope_singlesource.py onto GateCoverageScopeSource private helpers-live-topology proof preserved (still reads gc.load_workflow_models()+gc._COMPOSITE_ROUTING); (e) sole-caller audit re-adjudicated to a meaningful post-deletion pin. WP05 STILL OWES (NOT done by WP04): FR-004d committed coverage-parity-inventory.md; T029 test_pre_review_gate_integration.py stale derive_test_scope docstrings (lines 7,27,765-runtime-safe, passes); and reconcile the now-REDUNDANT planned new file test_gate_coverage_census_topology.py since the mutation-bite already migrated in-place. Shared-file edits into WP05/WP02-owned files are sanctioned by the WP04 prompt (green-gate necessity) and documented in the commit.
